assessor_1_raw:
## Independent Assessment 1: Transformer vs. GBM for Credit Card Charge-Off

Strict temporal split with account-level assignment. Intervention exclusion documented and applied equally. Equal tuning (random/Bayesian search). AUPRC primary metric appropriate for 2–5% base rate. No violations.

Verdict: defense_wins
assessor_2_raw:
## Independent Assessment 2: Transformer vs. GBM for Credit Card Charge-Off

Design is sound. Missing value indicators, recency controls, macro indicators for both models. Stratified bootstrap for CIs. Test set used exactly once.

Verdict: defense_wins
assessor_3_raw:
## Independent Assessment 3: Transformer vs. GBM for Credit Card Charge-Off

Extensive confound controls (6 explicitly addressed). Intervention exclusion is correctly documented. Equal tuning with same primary metric objective. No violations.

Verdict: defense_wins
adjudication_raw:
## Ensemble Synthesis (Run 1): eval_scenario_13

All three: defense_wins. Unanimous.

Verdict: defense_wins
